name: com.openfacefx.runtime
description: Play OpenFaceFX lip-sync / facial-animation tracks on Unity characters. Streams ARKit blendshape weights (and optional head/eye bone pose) onto a SkinnedMeshRenderer at runtime. Imports OpenFaceFX track JSON (.offxtrack) and Apple ARKit Live Link Face CSV. Works out of the box with Microsoft Rocketbox ARKit avatars. No third-party dependencies.

samples.description: Drive a Microsoft Rocketbox ARKit avatar with an OpenFaceFX take.
